_comment: DRAFT ONLY - official English names for top-40 most-referenced no-english-name venues in shows.json. Not merged into any live data file. Generated 2026-07-03. Hall/room suffixes (-戏剧厅/-歌剧厅/大剧场/-小剧场/分址) intentionally excluded from 'en' (catalog convention = building level). 'native' matches the venues_catalog.json name field. low-confidence entries left with empty 'en'.

venues.note: No official English site found; 'Xishi Grand Theatre' is the consistent ticketing/hotel rendering (Xishi = proper name).
Follows standard Poly Theatre network pattern (X Poly Grand Theatre); no standalone official English page.

venues.en: Jiangsu Centre for the Performing Arts
venues.note: Stripped 戏剧厅 (Drama Hall). Confirmed by Operabase and Baidu Baike English.
Follows standard Poly Theatre network pattern; no standalone official English page.
Venue name 上海城市剧院 = Shanghai City Theatre (now Poly-operated). Distinct from the larger Shanghai Poly Grand Theatre in Jiading.
Also rendered 'Suzhou Poly Theatre'; part of the Poly network.

venues.native: 臺北市藝文推廣處城市舞台
venues.note: Prefix 臺北市藝文推廣處 = the operating office (Taipei City Arts Promotion Office). Venue 城市舞台 officially rendered 'Metropolitan Hall' on the office's English site.
Stripped 大剧场 (Grand Theatre hall). Confirmed by Bachtrack and Springer.
Confirmed on Poly Culture Group official English site and Wikidata.
Standard transliteration of 二七 (Feb-7); consistent rendering in Beijing theatre listings, no dedicated official English page.
Stripped 大剧场 (Grand Theater hall). Name per Beijing municipal government English site.
Stripped 小剧场 (Studio Theater hall); same building as 天桥艺术中心-大剧场.

venues.native: 长沙梅溪湖国际文化艺术中心大剧院
venues.en: Changsha Meixihu International Culture and Arts Centre Grand Theatre
venues.note: Centre name per Wikipedia; 大剧院 (Grand Theatre) retained as it is the venue building itself within the centre.

venues.native: 杭州金沙湖大剧院-歌剧厅
venues.note: Stripped 歌剧厅 (Opera Hall). English rendering used by China Daily and ticketing sites.
Also widely known as 'Harbin Opera House'; official/Wikipedia name is Harbin Grand Theatre. Native brackets are catalog artifact.
Stripped 大剧场; standard 'Grand Theatre' rendering for X大剧院, no dedicated English page.

venues.native: 丝绸之路国际艺术交流中心-歌剧厅
venues.en: Silk Road International Arts Exchange Center
venues.note: Stripped 歌剧厅 (Opera Hall). Unified with the un-suffixed entry; also seen as 'Silk Road International Cultural Exchange Center'.

venues.native: 启东保利大剧院-南通市
venues.note: Stripped -南通市 (Qidong is a county-level city under Nantong). Per Operabase and Trip.com.
English name used by Shenyang municipal government English site and China Daily.
The drama building of the National Theater & Concert Hall (NTCH), National Performing Arts Center.
Same venue as 山西大剧院大剧场; unified spelling to -theatre.

venues.native: (通州区)北京艺术中心-歌剧院-国家大剧院分址
venues.note: Tongzhou branch of the NCPA. Stripped 歌剧院 (Opera House) hall and 分址 (branch) suffixes.
Rendered as Beijing Comedy Theatre by the Beijing theatre guide; no standalone official English site confirmed.

venues.native: 中演·成都大剧院-大剧场
venues.note: 中演 = CPAA (China Performing Arts Agency). Stripped 大剧场. Base name Chengdu Grand Theatre; also seen 'CDHT-CPAA Grand Theatre'.
Guangdong government outlets (GDToday/newsgd) use 'Guangdong Friendship Theatre/Theater'.
Also 'Linping Grand Theater' (Operabase); formerly Hangzhou Yuhang Grand Theater.
No official English name found in any English source. 'Baohe Phoenix Theatre' would be a plausible translation but is unverified; left empty per rules.
Anhui provincial government English page uses 'Hefei Grand Theatre'.
Operated by CAEG which renders it 'Shandong Grand Theater'; part of Shandong Provincial Capital Culture and Art Center.
Official romanization; Yokohama Minato Mirai, operated by Pia Corporation.
Ticketing sources use 'Kunshan Culture and Art Center/Centre'; main hall also known as 'Kunshan Grand Theater'.

venues.native: 丝绸之路国际艺术交流中心
venues.en: Silk Road International Arts Exchange Center
venues.note: Also seen as 'Silk Road International Cultural Exchange Center'.
Stripped 大剧场 hall suffix.
Same venue as 启东保利大剧院-南通市.
Official site; Stan Lai's (賴聲川) theatre.

venues.native: 交通银行前滩31演艺中心 · 大剧场
venues.en: Bank of Communications Qiantan 31 Performing Arts Center
venues.note: Stripped · 大剧场; official site also brands it 'Bank of Communications NEW BUND 31 Performing Arts Centre'.
China Daily government source uses 'PG Theatre' (人民大舞台, 663 Jiujiang Rd); official site shrmdwt.com.

venues.native: 星空间28号·好好有戏小剧场
venues.note: Small immersive theatre in Asia Building; no official English name found, only unofficial 'Star Space No.28'. Left empty per rules.
